title: justicia tianguensis
intro: Justicia tianguensis, also known as Tzitzimitl in some regions, is a plant species that belongs to the Acanthaceae family. Native to Mexico, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Justicia tianguensis include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies for various health conditions.
